analysis.reasoning: Core message: An optimistic aphorism that humanity will recover stronger after COVID-19. No explicit mention of China, its system, history, or foreign policy; no criticism of the West. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; tweet is non-confrontational and universal. CH2 (China as benevolent power): Not present; no reference to China’s international role, support for multilateralism, or shared destiny language beyond generic optimism. CH3 (China’s epic history): Not present; no historical or China-specific resilience. CH4 (appropriate political system/values): Not present; no mention of Chinese governance or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Not present; no claims about Chinese development or achievements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not present; no cultural or heritage content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes none of the listed narratives.
